concept: Geometry Dash Geometry Dash is a rhythm-based platformer where players control a geometric icon, tapping the screen to jump, fly, or flip, navigating a series of obstacles and spikes synchronized to music in auto-scrolling levels. The game's core mechanics involve precise timing and adapting to different game modes (e.g., cube, ship, ball) that alter player movement, with death resulting in a restart from the beginning or a last checkpoint in practice mode.
name: Geometry Dash
